steps.title: Set up
steps.content:
Plug $x = \dfrac{2}{5}$ into $f(x) = -10x + b$ and set equal to $-53$:
$$-10 \cdot \frac{2}{5} + b = -53$$
$$-4 + b = -53$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content:
Add 4 to both sides:
$$b = -53 + 4 = -49$$ In Desmos, the one-row regression $y_1\sim -10x_1+b$ using $x_1=\frac25$ and $y_1=-53$ also returns $b=-49$.
